testcase.name: test_non_admin_forbidden_403
testcase.failure: tests/test_email_pipeline.py:101: in test_non_admin_forbidden_403 assert r.status_code == 403, r.text E AssertionError: {"configured":{"order":["resend","smtp"],"resend":{"configured":true,"from":"aiclonechats.com <admin@aiclonechats.com>"},"smtp":{"configured":false,"host":null,"port":587,"from":null,"use_tls":true}},"totals_24h":{"total":5,"ok":2,"failures":3,"success_rate":0.4},"per_provider_24h":[{"provider":"resend","total":3,"ok":2,"failures":1,"success_rate":0.6666666666666666,"avg_latency_ms":195},{"provider":"smtp","total":2,"ok":0,"failures":2,"success_rate":0.0,"avg_latency_ms":2}],"recent":[{"event_id":"24c06f1078a645bd97d45300e0f96e66","event_group":"595a39b58674","timestamp":"2026-05-11T17:22:25.654301+00:00","provider":"resend","purpose":"test_smtp_fail_resend_ok","recipient_domain":"example.com","ok":true,"error_code":null,"latency_ms":224},{"event_id":"55d9549a3d724524870773df6ba21936","event_group":"595a39b58674","timestamp":"2026-05-11T17:22:25.426785+00:00","provider":"smtp","purpose":"test_smtp_fail_resend_ok","recipient_domain":"example.com","ok":false,"error_code":"exc_OSError","latency_ms":4},{"event_id":"52b420d471934affa7497af69896d602","event_group":"568222294607","timestamp":"2026-05-11T17:22:12.815963+00:00","provider":"smtp","purpose":"test_fallback","recipient_domain":"example.com","ok":false,"error_code":"not_configured","latency_ms":0},{"event_id":"8e1f0aba52734cfd8749ce59d4aeb81a","event_group":"568222294607","timestamp":"2026-05-11T17:22:12.812313+00:00","provider":"resend","purpose":"test_fallback","recipient_domain":"example.com","ok":false,"error_code":"http_401","latency_ms":148},{"event_id":"1991f48bdbfa4a3ea99dfaca66c56e09","event_group":"06add8c361c2","timestamp":"2026-05-11T17:21:42.821521+00:00","provider":"resend","purpose":"email_otp","recipient_domain":"example.com","ok":true,"error_code":null,"latency_ms":214}]} E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
